tools.name: bash
tools.description: Execute a shell command and return stdout/stderr

tools.name: file_read
tools.description: Read the contents of a file at the given path

offset.description: Line number to start reading from

tools.name: file_write
tools.description: Write content to a file, creating it if it doesn't exist

tools.name: file_edit
tools.description: Search and replace a unique string in a file

tools.name: glob
tools.description: Find files matching a glob pattern

tools.name: grep
tools.description: Search for a regex pattern in files

path.description: File or directory to search in

tools.name: python_exec
tools.description: Execute Python code and return output

tools.name: web_search
tools.description: Search the web and return results

tools.name: web_fetch
tools.description: Fetch a web page and return its text content

tools.name: git_status
tools.description: Show the working tree status of the git repository

tools.name: git_diff
tools.description: Show changes between commits, working tree, etc.

target.description: What to diff (e.g. HEAD, staged, file path)

path.description: File path to show history for

tools.name: git_commit
tools.description: Create a git commit with the staged changes

tools.name: list_directory
tools.description: List files and directories at a given path

categories.single_tool: One tool call answering one question
categories.multi_sequential: Tool A result feeds into Tool B
categories.multi_parallel: Multiple independent tools in one response
